title: milium lanatum
intro: Milium lanatum, also known as sweet cicely or myrrhis, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Milium lanatum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Milium lanatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
